summary: Fixes tutorial card clicks and clarifies the step 2 to step 3 tutorial flow.
updatePrompt: Update Planban from piercekearns/planban, verify the plugin and MCP tools are available, then reopen Planban in the Codex in-app browser.
changelogSummary: Tutorial cards now open reliably in the inspect step, the move-to-open transition is clearer, and the board header controls stay aligned when no update is available.
